title: Seseli nevskii
taxonomy: Seseli nevskii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, Apiaceae. It is native to the Russian Far East, specifically in the Primorsky and Khabarovsk Krais. The genus Seseli is a group of plants commonly known as the fern-leaved or fern-scented caraways. Seseli nevskii is a perennial plant that grows up to 50-80 cm in height. It is a relatively rare species of plant, with limited information available on its classification and distribution.
